name: pricing-card
title: PricingCard
description: A single pricing tier on the Onda glass Surface — tier name, a large price, billing period, an accent-checkmark feature list, and a CTA button. Rises in on the house spring; set recommended to lift + scale it and add an accent badge + glow. One card; the consumer arranges three.
pickWhen: a pricing tier — solo or arranged as three across. Mark exactly one with `recommended` for the lift + glow signature.
